target.title: fix: show WebChat preamble progress during tool activity
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
Control UI was not showing WebChat/Codex preamble and commentary progress while tools were active, so users could see an idle-looking run until the final assistant message arrived. This patch projects those progress events into the chat stream, preserves pre-final commentary, and keeps keyed preamble updates from being collapsed into unrelated final messages.

## Summary
- Shows Codex/WebChat preamble and commentary progress in Control UI during tool activity.
- Preserves pre-final stream commentary before final assistant messages.
- Keeps keyed preamble segments independent from accumulated stream snapshots, supports keyed retraction, strips silent/directive-only progress, and preserves live timestamp ordering around tool cards.

## Implementation
- Projects Codex app-server `item` and `preamble` progress events into Control UI chat stream segments.
- Splits keyed preambles from the existing tool-indexed accumulated stream lane.
- Materializes pre-final segments by timestamp so history stays chronological.
- Removes proof media from the branch; proof remains in PR evidence, not product tree.

## Evidence
- `pnpm lint --threads=8` (pass)
- `pnpm exec vitest --run ui/src/ui/app-tool-stream.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/stream-reconciliation.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts` (201 passed)
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` (pass)
- `pnpm tsgo:core` (pass)
- `git diff --check` (pass)
- `CODEX_HOME=/home/lumadmin/.codex codex review --base origin/main` (pass, no discrete correctness issues found)
- Crabbox fresh PR checkout: provider `local-container`, lease `cbx_d600f337df23`, Node `v24.17.0`, pnpm `11.2.2`, focused tests plus UI/core type lanes pass

## CI / reviewer follow-up
- CI rerun triggered by no-code force-push to `6fe30bb9254dfe1fc427e379cea7c060307125f8`; tree matches reviewed commit `533fba216826a7d29b34ab04b0f25277d0daf823`.
- Current CI: 53 passing, 1 failing, 10 skipped. The remaining failure is `checks-node-compact-small-7`, a gateway cron shard outside this PR's UI diff.
- The failing shard was reproduced locally under Node `v24.13.0` with the same compact-small-7 group sequence and passed, including the cron group (`50 passed`). The single cron file also passes locally with `pnpm exec vitest --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-server.config.ts --run src/gateway/server.cron.test.ts` (`18 passed`).
- Real behavior proof now passes after adding the required `What Problem This Solves` and `Evidence` sections.
- ClawSweeper re-review requested after the updated proof/code push.

## AI disclosure
This PR was authored and submitted under ragesaq's GitHub identity. Implementation assistance was provided by Chisel via OpenAI Codex (`openai/gpt-5.5`). The evidence above lists the verification commands and review loop outputs used before requesting maintainer/bot review.
target.author: ragesaq
